name: Microsoft Sentinel delegation
description: Permission groups for Microsoft Sentinel. These are workload groups: Sentinel uses Azure RBAC roles (Microsoft.SecurityInsights) assigned at the workspace / resource-group scope, so the workload role binds directly to the Entra group (no Entra directory role involved). Ships the standard Sentinel personas - Reader (view), Responder (manage incidents), Contributor (author rules/playbooks), Automation Contributor (manage playbooks), and Playbook Operator (run, no edit).

PIM-Definitions-Services.GroupDescription: Microsoft Sentinel - Reader (view data, incidents, workbooks; read-only)
Microsoft Sentinel - Responder (manage incidents, run playbooks; no rule authoring)
Microsoft Sentinel - Contributor (author analytics rules, workbooks, hunting)
Microsoft Sentinel - Automation Contributor (create and edit playbooks/automation rules)
Microsoft Sentinel - Playbook Operator (run/attach playbooks; no edit)
